response:
Subject: Farewell and Thank You

As I prepare to move on to my next chapter, I wanted to take a moment to say goodbye and express my sincere gratitude for the time we've spent working together. I have truly valued the camaraderie, collaboration, and support you have all shown me during my time here. The memories and professional relationships I've built with each of you are something I will carry with me throughout my career. Please stay in touch—I would love to hear how everyone continues to thrive and succeed. Wishing you all the very best, and thank you once again for making this workplace such a wonderful experience.
